response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with direct hits on the role's primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which precisely matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship through TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development, plus authored open-source frameworks and a GIS platform deployed on Kubernetes.
strengths: Primary stack match with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple recent roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP development experience at current role
Strong polyglot background (Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) plus MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned (Java covers the secondary stack partially)
Cloud experience skews AWS-only with no GCP/Azure evidence
